76656896.title: Patrick Sheehan (Illinois politician)
76656896.extract:
Patrick Sheehan is an American politician who has served as a member of the Illinois House of Representatives for the 37th district, since being appointed to replace Tim Ozinga who resigned. In the 2022 Illinois Senate election he contested District 19 but was defeated by Michael Hastings. Sheehan is also a police officer for the Plainfield, Illinois Police Department. Sheehan's district includes all or parts of the following communities: Lockport, Homer Glen, Joliet, New Lenox, Mokena, Frankfort, Tinley Park, Orland Park, and Orland Hills. 
On September 9, 2024, Sheehan was a member of the following Illinois House committees:

Appropriations - Public Safety Committee (HAPP)
Counties & Townships Committee (HCOT)
Elementary & Secondary Education: Administration, Licensing & Charter Schools (HELO)
Energy & Environment Committee (HENG)
Ethics & Elections (SHEE)
Restorative Justice (SHRJ)
Revenue & Finance Committee (HREF)
